result:
Results for 'top things to do restaurants and attractions' in Normandy, France:
1. Normandie Luge, Site de loisirs Nature et Sensations, Luge sur rails, Accrobranches, Tyroliennes, Jardin, Minigolf [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.7 (1100 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM
   📍 Les Trois Croix
   "Stayed for lunch, pizza was perfect and watched loons bungee and sky swing."
2. National Trust - Birling Gap and the Seven Sisters [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.8 (14000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM Sun
   📍 Beachy Head Rd
   "And there is so much to do and see that one trip is not enough."
3. The Needles Landmark Attraction [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.3 (15000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM Sun
   📍 Alum Bay New Rd
   "The attractions were worth the visit!"
4. Fishers Farm Park [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.8 (3400 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM Sun
   📍 Newpound Lane
   "Food was tasty and so much more to see and do."
5. Model Village Godshill [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.7 (5000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM Sun
   📍 High St
   "A must-see attraction that's fun for all ages!"
